General.Name: Asian Citrus Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Asian Citrus Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, produces, plants, cultivates, and sells agricultural produce in the People's Republic of China. The company operates through Plantation Business, Fruit Distribution Business, Air-Conditioners Distribution Business, and Sales and Distribution of Consumables and Others Business segments. It also engages in the distribution and installation of air-conditioners; and plantation, cultivation, and distribution of various fruits; sale of passion and other fruits; and provision of technology-related services and supply chain finance technology solution. Asian Citrus Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2003 and is based in Sheung Wan, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Arion Commercial Centre, Sheung Wan, Hong Kong
